itemListElement.reviewBody: Such a big school yet a french student can't pursue it in 10th, the principal took the registration fee and didn't take the admission in Wagholi and then Yerwada branch and Magarpatta branch both didn't respond at all. Yerwada branch is so old and rusty.

My child has been studying here for the last 5 years (since Vibgyor started in Kesnand), yet the basic writing ability is shockingly poor. Even today, my child cannot write one full page in 30 minutes, nor even two lines of Hindi in that time. At home, it took me 5 hours to make him write just two pages of Hindi. This clearly reflects the quality of education and academic rigor being delivered by the school.
After speaking with multiple parents, it is evident that many Vibgyor students—especially those who started during the pandemic—severely lack writing skills. Unfortunately, this issue has never been corrected post-pandemic.
Despite repeated attempts to work with teachers and coordinators, nothing has improved. Homework is rarely checked, classwork is often left incomplete, and notebooks contain numerous mistakes even after being “checked.” Homework, when given, is minimal, and there is almost zero follow-up if a child does not complete it.
What is most disappointing is the attitude of the coordinators. When parents raise concerns, they are given false assurances and empty promises. Instead of focusing on improving the child’s writing and academic foundation, parents are diverted into unnecessary counseling sessions and told to “follow office processes,” while the core issue remains completely unaddressed.
In hindsight, I should have withdrawn my child two years ago. The school appears to have hired low-quality teaching staff locally, and parents are treated more like paying clients than partners in a child’s education.
We enrolled our child believing that teachers would work with us to nurture and strengthen our child’s learning. Sadly, this has turned out to be one of the worst educational experiences. The school charges high fees but puts in minimal academic effort, especially in building foundational skills like writing.

Today my son was a part of picnic arranged by Vibgyor rise. Sincere appreciation for the fantastic trip Vibgyor Rise arranged. A special thank you and appreciation to the teachers and organizers who worked so hard to make this trip a huge success. Thank you to the management as well for considering giving the students such exposures. We're inundated. 🙏🏻

This review is about vibgyor Wagholi transport they are charging premium rates for school bus transportation 35 to 45 percent more than any other schools transport in my case bus is very old and rusty no GPS no CCTV  in bus as per their promise seats are moving

VIBGYOR is best school in Wagholi. I have shifted my son from ICSE board to CBSE here. Along with academics there are special activities as well so he is really enjoying  school. Now a days he started asking me that why we have weekly off on Saturdays and Sundays, I want to go to school. Seen conceptual and activity based learning which make kids understand  and remember it. School infrastructure is very nice and priority is given for student safety. Labs, Library and special activities rooms are very well equipped. 👌

As a parent I can vouch that this is the best School in Wagholi with the best curriculum and infrastructure. My son is in grade -2 and I have seen immense growth in him in a short period.  He is going to his school with full enthu. The school premises is well structured, classrooms are highly maintained, teachers are so good and co-operative. Syllabus is child centric and campus is fully AC. SPA coaches are so professional,they conduct all the sports and game very well. Also Admin department is very co-operative. Must recommends, it's the best budget school in Wagholi. You must enroll your child for his/her overall growth. From A very Happy Parent 😊😊

My son is studying in Vibgyor Rise Wagholi . First of all plus points for it’s infrastructure and highly maintained classrooms which gives feel of 5star. Second, my son is very fond of going to school because he is liking the environment of the school. I have seen many positive changes in my child academically and behavioural too. He likes his PSA too much. All the staff including Admin to coordinators are very helpful and supportive. Teachers are very good and helpful too. That kind of motivation my child is receiving from his teachers is commendable. I’m blessed to be part of Vibyor family and can say it proudly that this is the best school in Wagholi area. Keep Rocking !
